name: learn-java-frameworks-marketplace
description: Learn Java frameworks by analyzing and building simplified versions — includes API-first (outside-in) and core-first (inside-out) learning approaches

plugins.name: api-learning
plugins.description: Analyze Java frameworks outside-in from the API surface and build simplified versions with progressive learning

plugins.name: core-learning
plugins.description: Analyze Java frameworks inside-out and build simplified versions with progressive learning
